title: Echoes of our
subtitle: What Ingeri families say about their experience.

items.quote: Since our daughter joined La P'tite Crèche Ingeri, she blossoms every day. The team is attentive, caring, and we truly feel our child is in good hands.
items.name: Amina M.

items.quote: The Montessori approach combined with Christian values — that is exactly what we were looking for our son. He comes home from school happy, curious and confident.
items.name: Jean K.

items.quote: What won me over was the genuine attention given to each child. Not a number, but a unique person. Ingeri is a family.
items.name: Gisèle N.

items.quote: Bilingualism is a real asset. Our children speak French and English fluently thanks to the daily immersion offered by Ingeri.
items.name: Patrick U.

items.quote: We visited several schools in Kigali, but Ingeri stands out for the quality of its staff and the cleanliness of its facilities. A real favourite.
items.name: Claire M.

items.quote: My son was very shy before joining Ingeri. In a few months, he opened up, made friends and participates enthusiastically in activities.
items.name: David N.

items.quote: Communication with teachers is excellent. We receive photos and regular updates. We really feel involved.
items.name: Sandra H.

items.quote: Ingeri offers a safe and stimulating environment. Our daughter loves going there every morning, and that is the best sign for us.
items.name: Rachel M.
